features.description: The copied workspace contains the portable bootstrap files and runtime helpers.
steps: Copy the template into a new workspace
Verify the runtime directories and helper scripts

features.description: The placeholder prompt, bindings, schema, and workflow are replaced with workspace-specific contracts.
steps: Customize the domain schema and workflow

features.description: The template live catalog is seeded into a fresh harness SQLite database.
The dry-run wrapper can claim the first ready issue without mutating the canonical live database.
steps: Verify sandbox state changes while canonical state remains intact

features.description: The preview-first live claim wrapper exposes the next ready issue without opening a lease until explicitly executed.
steps: Execute only when the workspace is ready

features.description: The workspace can preview or execute dependency-based queue promotion through the reusable harness wrapper.
steps: Execute after closing eligible issues as done
